---
title: "Welcome to CS Quest!"
subtitle: "Your Introduction to Computer Science at Allegheny College"
format:
  live-html:
    toc: false
---

::: {.hero}
# 🎓 Welcome College Fair Visitors!

New to Computer Science? You're in the right place! Let's explore what CS is all about and try some real coding!
:::

::: {.quest-badge}
🌟 START HERE | No Experience Needed | 5 Minutes to Get Started
:::

::: {.tip-box}
**💻 Interactive Options:**

- 📓 **[Open in JupyterLite](../jupyterlite/lab/index.html?path=intro/college-fair-start.ipynb)** - Full Jupyter environment in your browser
- 📥 **[Download Notebook](../files/intro/college-fair-start.ipynb)** - For use in local Jupyter or Google Colab
:::

## 🚀 Quick Start: Choose Your Adventure

<div class="quest-grid">

::: {.quest-card}
### 🌟 What is CS?
**Never thought about studying CS?**

Discover what Computer Science really is (hint: it's not just coding!).

[Learn More →](what-is-cs.qmd)

⏱️ 3 minutes
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### 💼 Why Study CS?
**Curious about careers?**

Explore job opportunities, salaries, and the impact CS professionals make.

[Explore Careers →](why-study-cs.qmd)

⏱️ 4 minutes
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### 🎮 Try It Now!
**Want to code RIGHT NOW?**

Write your first program in 30 seconds—no installation needed!

[Start Coding →](try-it-now.qmd)

⏱️ 5 minutes
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### 🎯 Major vs Minor
**Deciding on a program?**

Compare CS Major and CS Minor to find your perfect fit.

[Compare Programs →](major-vs-minor.qmd)

⏱️ 5 minutes
:::

</div>

---

## 📚 Ready to Learn Python?

Once you've explored the basics above, dive into our interactive coding quests!

::: {.highlight-box .highlight-info}
**🎒 Beginner-Friendly Quests** (Start here!)

Each quest is a 5-minute coding adventure with interactive challenges:

1. **[Quest 1: Variables](../lessons/01-variables.qmd)** - Your coding backpack
2. **[Quest 2: Data Types](../lessons/02-data-types.qmd)** - Shapes of information
3. **[Quest 3: Conditionals](../lessons/03-conditionals.qmd)** - Choose your path
4. **[Quest 4: Loops](../lessons/04-loops.qmd)** - The power of repetition
5. **[Quest 5: Lists](../lessons/05-lists.qmd)** - Collecting treasures

[View All 19 Quests →](../all-quests.qmd)
:::

---

## 🎓 About Allegheny College Computer Science

::: {.concept-box}
### Why Allegheny?

✅ **Small Classes** - Personal attention from expert faculty  
✅ **Hands-On Research** - Work on real projects from day one  
✅ **Supportive Community** - Collaborative, not competitive  
✅ **Career Success** - Strong job placement and grad school admissions  
✅ **Flexible Programs** - Major, minor, or just explore!  

### Quick Stats
- 📊 **13:1** student-to-faculty ratio
- 🎓 **100%** of CS majors complete a capstone project
- 💼 **95%+** employment or grad school placement
- 🌍 **Remote internships** available worldwide
:::

---

## 💡 Three Ways to Code Interactively

All our lessons include **live code** you can edit and run!

::: {.tip-box}
**Choose Your Coding Style:**

1. **📝 On Lesson Pages** - Click code cells and run them directly
2. **🚀 JupyterLite** - Full Jupyter environment in your browser  
   [Launch JupyterLite →](../jupyterlite/lab/index.html)
3. **📥 Download Notebooks** - Use locally or in Google Colab  
   [Download Files →](../files/)

[Learn More About Interactive Features →](../interactive.qmd)
:::

---

## 📞 Connect With Us

::: {.highlight-box .highlight-info}
**Have Questions? We're Here to Help!**

**Computer Science Department**
- 📧 **Email**: obonhamcarter@allegheny.edu
- 🌐 **Website**: [https://cs.allegheny.edu](https://cs.allegheny.edu)
- 👨‍💻 **Website**: [https://www.oliverbonhamcarter.com](https://www.oliverbonhamcarter.com)
- 📍 **Location**: Alden Hall, Allegheny College

**Visit Campus**
- 🏫 Schedule a tour
- 💬 Meet current CS students
- 🎓 Sit in on a class
- 🔬 See our labs and projects

**General Admissions**
- 🌐 [allegheny.edu/admissions](https://allegheny.edu/admissions)
- ☎️ (814) 332-4351
:::

---

## 🎯 Your Next Step

::: {.story-box}
**Ready to Start Your CS Journey?**

1. ✅ **Explore the intro pages** above (5-15 minutes total)
2. ✅ **Try coding** in the [Try It Now](try-it-now.qmd) section
3. ✅ **Start Quest 1** if you want to keep learning
4. ✅ **Contact us** with questions!

**Remember**: Every expert programmer started exactly where you are now. The only difference? They took the first step. 

**Your first step starts today!** 🚀
:::

---

<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 2em;">

### 🌟 Start Your Adventure

<div class="quest-grid" style="margin-top: 1em;">

::: {.quest-card}
[🌟 What is CS?](what-is-cs.qmd)
:::

::: {.quest-card}
[🎮 Try Coding Now](try-it-now.qmd)
:::

::: {.quest-card}
[🎒 Quest 1: Variables](../lessons/01-variables.qmd)
:::

</div>

</div>
